name: Avocado Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 garlic cloves, minced or 2 teaspoons grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, sauté the onion in oil until translucent.
2. Add the roasted tomatillos, chopped into halves, to the pan with the sautéed onions.
3. Stir in lime juice and seasonings (salt and white pepper).
4. Cook for 2 minutes, then remove from heat and let it cool.
5. Peel and add the avocados to the mixture in the pan.
6. Transfer all ingredients to a food processor and puree until smooth.
7. Allow the salsa to stand for at least 1 hour before serving.
